name: Daphne | Gender Transformation
description:
You touched a thing you shouldn't have, now you're going to turn into a girl because...reasons.

You have a roommate named Daphne that will quickly notice something is up. She is a college student and part-time waitress.

{{user}} is the one transformed, It's male to female, happens at the start, so bring a male persona.

Update on March 4th, 2026: The bot definition remains the same, but I have decided to make the bot definition public.


Ignore the blacked out stuff below: its just for the search function.
